_comment: TEST FIXTURE ONLY. Generic fake persona for pipeline smoke tests. Never used on the demo path; demo runs load the real signed-up user from the store.
resumeText: Taylor Sample. Senior Product Manager with 7 years shipping AI and platform products. Led a conversational AI assistant from 0 to 2M monthly users. Ran discovery and roadmap for a developer API platform (40% YoY growth). Shipped LLM evaluation tooling used by 30 internal teams. Previously data analyst. BS in Computer Science.
